mapper.sql: WITH RECURSIVE period_params AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN #{param.billCd} = '30' THEN DATE_TRUNC('month', MAKE_DATE(CAST(#{param.year} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{param.month} AS INTEGER), 1))::date WHEN #{param.billCd} = '20' THEN ((MAKE_DATE(CAST(#{param.year} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{param.month} AS INTEGER), 1) - INTERVAL '1 month') + INTERVAL '20 day')::date END, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_dt, TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN #{param.billCd} = '30' THEN (DATE_TRUNC('month', MAKE_DATE(CAST(#{param.year} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{param.month} AS INTEGER), 1)) + INTERVAL '1 month')::date WHEN #{param.billCd} = '20' THEN (MAKE_DATE(CAST(#{param.year} AS INTEGER), CAST(#{param.month} AS INTEGER), 1) + INTERVAL '20 day')::date END, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_dt ), ultimate_parent_map AS ( SELECT company_id, excclc_company_id AS parent_id, excclc_company_id AS ultimate_id, 1 AS level FROM shipper WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT upm.company_id, s.excclc_company_id, s.excclc_company_id, upm.level + 1 FROM ultimate_parent_map upm INNER JOIN shipper s ON upm.ultimate_id = s.company_id WHERE s.del_yn = 'N' AND s.use_yn = 'Y' AND upm.ultimate_id != s.excclc_company_id AND upm.level < 4 ), final_parent_map AS MATERIALIZED ( SELECT fpm.company_id, CAST(fpm.ultimate_id AS INTEGER) AS ultimate_id FROM ( SELECT company_id, ultimate_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY level DESC) AS rn FROM ultimate_parent_map ) fpm INNER JOIN shipper boss_sh ON boss_sh.company_id = fpm.ultimate_id AND boss_sh.bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId} AND boss_sh.bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billCd} AND boss_sh.del_yn = 'N' AND boss_sh.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE fpm.rn = 1 ), transport_by_month AS ( SELECT tr.transport_id, tr.sender_company_id, tr.sender_company_nm, tr.sender_transport_shipper_cd, tr.charge_cd, tr.sender_region_cd, tr.sender_region_dtl_cd, tr.sender_manager_nm, tr.sender_address, tr.sender_tel_no, tr.sender_manager_tel_no, tr.sender_rmk, tr.receiver_company_id, tr.receiver_company_nm, tr.receiver_transport_shipper_cd, tr.receiver_region_cd, tr.receiver_region_dtl_cd, tr.receiver_address, tr.receiver_tel_no, tr.receiver_manager_tel_no, tr.receiver_manager_nm, tr.receiver_rmk, tr.shipment_operation_date AS tr_shipment_operation_date, trd.transport_dtl_id, trd.calculation_cd, trd.calculation_target_cd, trd.sender_receiver_cd, trd.waybill_no, trd.kind_cd, trd.untpc, trd.qty, trd.amount, trd.rmk, trd.shipment_operation_date AS trd_shipment_operation_date, CAST(fpm.ultimate_id AS INTEGER) AS boss_id, 1 AS bill_dtl_dgre FROM transport_dtl trd INNER JOIN period_params pp ON trd.shipment_operation_date >= pp.start_dt AND trd.shipment_operation_date < pp.end_dt INNER JOIN transport tr ON tr.transport_id = trd.transport_id AND tr.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN final_parent_map fpm ON fpm.company_id = ( CASE WHEN trd.calculation_target_cd = 'SENDER' THEN tr.sender_company_id WHEN trd.calculation_target_cd = 'RECEIVER' THEN tr.receiver_company_id END ) WHERE trd.del_yn = 'N' AND trd.calculation_target_cd IN ('SENDER', 'RECEIVER') )
mapper.insert:
/* insertBillTransportIfNotExists */
, /* 생성된 bill_dtl_id의 정보를 미리 조회 (반복 서브쿼리 제거) */ target_bd AS ( SELECT bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_dtl_id = #{param.billDtlId} AND calculation_company_id = #{param.calculationCompanyId} ) INSERT INTO bill_transport ( transport_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, shipment_operation_date, sender_company_id, sender_company_nm, sender_transport_shipper_cd, charge_cd, sender_region_cd, sender_region_dtl_cd, sender_manager_nm, sender_address, sender_tel_no, sender_manager_tel_no, sender_rmk, receiver_company_id, receiver_company_nm, receiver_transport_shipper_cd, receiver_region_cd, receiver_region_dtl_cd, receiver_address, receiver_tel_no, receiver_manager_tel_no, receiver_manager_nm, receiver_rmk, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) SELECT DISTINCT ON (tbma.transport_id) tbma.transport_id, tbd.bill_dtl_id, tbd.bill_id, tbd.bill_dtl_dgre, tbd.calculation_company_id, tbma.tr_shipment_operation_date, tbma.sender_company_id, tbma.sender_company_nm, tbma.sender_transport_shipper_cd, tbma.charge_cd, tbma.sender_region_cd, tbma.sender_region_dtl_cd, tbma.sender_manager_nm, tbma.sender_address, tbma.sender_tel_no, tbma.sender_manager_tel_no, tbma.sender_rmk, tbma.receiver_company_id, tbma.receiver_company_nm, tbma.receiver_transport_shipper_cd, tbma.receiver_region_cd, tbma.receiver_region_dtl_cd, tbma.receiver_address, tbma.receiver_tel_no, tbma.receiver_manager_tel_no, tbma.receiver_manager_nm, tbma.receiver_rmk, #{memberInfo.memberId}, now(), #{memberInfo.memberId}, now(), tbma.tr_del_yn FROM transport_by_month_all tbma INNER JOIN target_bd tbd ON tbd.calculation_company_id = tbma.boss_id

/* insertBillTransportAllIfNotExists */
, latest_bd_info AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (calculation_company_id) bill_id, calculation_company_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_dtl_dgre FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_id = #{param.billId} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY calculation_company_id, bill_dtl_dgre DESC ) INSERT INTO bill_transport ( transport_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, shipment_operation_date, sender_company_id, sender_company_nm, sender_transport_shipper_cd, charge_cd, sender_region_cd, sender_region_dtl_cd, sender_manager_nm, sender_address, sender_tel_no, sender_manager_tel_no, sender_rmk, receiver_company_id, receiver_company_nm, receiver_transport_shipper_cd, receiver_region_cd, receiver_region_dtl_cd, receiver_address, receiver_tel_no, receiver_manager_tel_no, receiver_manager_nm, receiver_rmk, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) SELECT DISTINCT ON (tbma.transport_id, lb.bill_dtl_id) tbma.transport_id, lb.bill_dtl_id, lb.bill_id, lb.bill_dtl_dgre, lb.calculation_company_id, tbma.tr_shipment_operation_date, tbma.sender_company_id, tbma.sender_company_nm, tbma.sender_transport_shipper_cd, tbma.charge_cd, tbma.sender_region_cd, tbma.sender_region_dtl_cd, tbma.sender_manager_nm, tbma.sender_address, tbma.sender_tel_no, tbma.sender_manager_tel_no, tbma.sender_rmk, tbma.receiver_company_id, tbma.receiver_company_nm, tbma.receiver_transport_shipper_cd, tbma.receiver_region_cd, tbma.receiver_region_dtl_cd, tbma.receiver_address, tbma.receiver_tel_no, tbma.receiver_manager_tel_no, tbma.receiver_manager_nm, tbma.receiver_rmk, #{memberInfo.memberId}, now(), #{memberInfo.memberId}, now(), tbma.tr_del_yn FROM transport_by_month_all tbma INNER JOIN latest_bd_info lb ON lb.calculation_company_id = tbma.boss_id ON CONFLICT (transport_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id) DO UPDATE SET shipment_operation_date = EXCLUDED.shipment_operation_date, sender_company_id = EXCLUDED.sender_company_id, sender_company_nm = EXCLUDED.sender_company_nm, sender_transport_shipper_cd = EXCLUDED.sender_transport_shipper_cd, charge_cd = EXCLUDED.charge_cd, sender_region_cd = EXCLUDED.sender_region_cd, sender_region_dtl_cd = EXCLUDED.sender_region_dtl_cd, sender_manager_nm = EXCLUDED.sender_manager_nm, sender_address = EXCLUDED.sender_address, sender_tel_no = EXCLUDED.sender_tel_no, sender_manager_tel_no = EXCLUDED.sender_manager_tel_no, sender_rmk = EXCLUDED.sender_rmk, receiver_company_id = EXCLUDED.receiver_company_id, receiver_company_nm = EXCLUDED.receiver_company_nm, receiver_transport_shipper_cd = EXCLUDED.receiver_transport_shipper_cd, receiver_region_cd = EXCLUDED.receiver_region_cd, receiver_region_dtl_cd = EXCLUDED.receiver_region_dtl_cd, receiver_address = EXCLUDED.receiver_address, receiver_tel_no = EXCLUDED.receiver_tel_no, receiver_manager_tel_no = EXCLUDED.receiver_manager_tel_no, receiver_manager_nm = EXCLUDED.receiver_manager_nm, receiver_rmk = EXCLUDED.receiver_rmk, chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now(), del_yn = EXCLUDED.del_yn

/* insertBillTransportFromTransport */
, target_bill_dtl AS ( SELECT bill_dtl_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_id = #{param.billId} AND del_yn = 'N' ) INSERT INTO bill_transport ( transport_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, shipment_operation_date, sender_company_id, sender_company_nm, sender_transport_shipper_cd, charge_cd, sender_region_cd, sender_region_dtl_cd, sender_manager_nm, sender_address, sender_tel_no, sender_manager_tel_no, sender_rmk, receiver_company_id, receiver_company_nm, receiver_transport_shipper_cd, receiver_region_cd, receiver_region_dtl_cd, receiver_address, receiver_tel_no, receiver_manager_tel_no, receiver_manager_nm, receiver_rmk, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) SELECT DISTINCT ON (tbm.transport_id, bdtl.calculation_company_id) tbm.transport_id, #{param.billId}, bdtl.bill_dtl_id, tbm.bill_dtl_dgre, bdtl.calculation_company_id, tbm.tr_shipment_operation_date, tbm.sender_company_id, tbm.sender_company_nm, tbm.sender_transport_shipper_cd, tbm.charge_cd, tbm.sender_region_cd, tbm.sender_region_dtl_cd, tbm.sender_manager_nm, tbm.sender_address, tbm.sender_tel_no, tbm.sender_manager_tel_no, tbm.sender_rmk, tbm.receiver_company_id, tbm.receiver_company_nm, tbm.receiver_transport_shipper_cd, tbm.receiver_region_cd, tbm.receiver_region_dtl_cd, tbm.receiver_address, tbm.receiver_tel_no, tbm.receiver_manager_tel_no, tbm.receiver_manager_nm, tbm.receiver_rmk, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, 'N' FROM transport_by_month tbm INNER JOIN target_bill_dtl bdtl ON bdtl.bill_dtl_dgre = tbm.bill_dtl_dgre AND bdtl.calculation_company_id = tbm.boss_id

/* insertBillTransportDtlFromTransport */
, target_bill_dtl AS ( SELECT bill_dtl_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_id = #{param.billId} AND del_yn = 'N' ) INSERT INTO bill_transport_dtl ( transport_id, transport_dtl_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, calculation_cd, sender_receiver_cd, waybill_no, kind_cd, untpc, qty, amount, rmk, shipment_operation_date, calculation_target_cd, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) SELECT tbm.transport_id, tbm.transport_dtl_id, bdtl.bill_dtl_id, #{param.billId}, tbm.bill_dtl_dgre, bdtl.calculation_company_id, tbm.calculation_cd, tbm.sender_receiver_cd, tbm.waybill_no, tbm.kind_cd, tbm.untpc, tbm.qty, tbm.amount, tbm.rmk, tbm.trd_shipment_operation_date, tbm.calculation_target_cd, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, 'N' FROM transport_by_month tbm INNER JOIN target_bill_dtl bdtl ON bdtl.bill_dtl_dgre = tbm.bill_dtl_dgre AND bdtl.calculation_company_id = tbm.boss_id

/* insertBillTransportDtlReCalculation */
, /* 생성된 bill_dtl 정보를 미리 확보 (반복적인 dgre 조회 서브쿼리 제거) */ target_bd AS ( SELECT bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_dtl_id = #{param.billDtlId} AND calculation_company_id = #{param.calculationCompanyId} ) INSERT INTO bill_transport_dtl ( transport_id, transport_dtl_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, calculation_cd, sender_receiver_cd, waybill_no, kind_cd, untpc, qty, amount, rmk, shipment_operation_date, calculation_target_cd, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) SELECT tbma.transport_id, tbma.transport_dtl_id, tbd.bill_dtl_id, tbd.bill_id, tbd.bill_dtl_dgre, tbd.calculation_company_id, tbma.calculation_cd, tbma.sender_receiver_cd, tbma.waybill_no, tbma.kind_cd, tbma.untpc, tbma.qty, tbma.amount, tbma.rmk, tbma.trd_shipment_operation_date, tbma.calculation_target_cd, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, tbma.trd_del_yn FROM transport_by_month_all tbma INNER JOIN target_bd tbd ON tbd.calculation_company_id = tbma.boss_id

/* insertBillTransportDtlReCalculationAll */
, latest_bd_info AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (calculation_company_id) bill_id, calculation_company_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_dtl_dgre FROM bill_dtl WHERE bill_id = #{param.billId} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY calculation_company_id, bill_dtl_dgre DESC ) INSERT INTO bill_transport_dtl ( transport_id, transport_dtl_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre, calculation_company_id, calculation_cd, sender_receiver_cd, waybill_no, kind_cd, untpc, qty, amount, rmk, shipment_operation_date, calculation_target_cd, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) SELECT tbma.transport_id, tbma.transport_dtl_id, lb.bill_dtl_id, lb.bill_id, lb.bill_dtl_dgre, lb.calculation_company_id, tbma.calculation_cd, tbma.sender_receiver_cd, tbma.waybill_no, tbma.kind_cd, tbma.untpc, tbma.qty, tbma.amount, tbma.rmk, tbma.trd_shipment_operation_date, tbma.calculation_target_cd, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, tbma.trd_del_yn FROM transport_by_month_all tbma INNER JOIN latest_bd_info lb ON lb.calculation_company_id = tbma.boss_id ON CONFLICT (transport_id, transport_dtl_id, bill_dtl_id, bill_id, bill_dtl_dgre) DO UPDATE SET calculation_company_id = EXCLUDED.calculation_company_id, calculation_cd = EXCLUDED.calculation_cd, sender_receiver_cd = EXCLUDED.sender_receiver_cd, waybill_no = EXCLUDED.waybill_no, kind_cd = EXCLUDED.kind_cd, untpc = EXCLUDED.untpc, qty = EXCLUDED.qty, amount = EXCLUDED.amount, rmk = EXCLUDED.rmk, shipment_operation_date = EXCLUDED.shipment_operation_date, calculation_target_cd = EXCLUDED.calculation_target_cd, chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now(), del_yn = EXCLUDED.del_yn
